skill.name: weekly-report
skill.description: 帮助用户梳理周报，按照完整逻辑展示工作价值和边界。当用户说"写周报"、"周报"、"梳理周报"、"整理工作"时触发。
skill.summary: Interactive weekly report assistant that guides users through structured work documentation.
skill.author: yunshu0909

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged multiple false positives. All detected patterns (backtick execution, crypto algorithm, high entropy) are markdown documentation elements, not executable code. This skill contains only prompt instructions in Chinese for weekly report generation. No security risks identified.

content.value_statement: Transform scattered work notes into clear, value-driven weekly reports. Guides users through modular categorization and logical documentation without forcing rigid templates.
actual_capabilities: Guides users through modular work categorization by role (developer, PM, designer, QA, etc.)
Collects work details using structured questioning (background, actions, results, next steps)
Generates formatted markdown reports with clear section organization
Preserves user's natural expression style instead of forcing template language
Handles both quantitative metrics and qualitative descriptions
Documents challenges and blockers with clear ownership assignment
limitations: Requires active user participation to provide work details and feedback
Cannot automatically extract data from project management tools or calendars
Focused on Chinese language output with culturally appropriate business communication
Does not support automated report scheduling or email distribution

use_cases.title: Software developer weekly status
use_cases.description: Developer documents feature work, bug fixes, code reviews, and technical blockers for team visibility.

use_cases.title: Project manager progress tracking
use_cases.description: PM captures project milestones, stakeholder communications, risk updates, and resource coordination activities.

use_cases.title: Cross-functional team reporting
use_cases.description: Team members from different roles standardize their weekly updates for leadership review and cross-team alignment.
use_cases.target_user: Cross-functional team members and operations staff

prompt_templates.title: Quick weekly summary
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me write my weekly report. This week I worked on: [list your main tasks briefly]. Please organize this into a clear report with next steps.
prompt_templates.scenario: For users who want a fast, straightforward report without detailed questioning

prompt_templates.title: Structured module-based report
prompt_templates.prompt: I need a detailed weekly report. Let me describe my work by category: [Customer Work], [Internal Projects], [Team Activities]. Please ask me questions to fill in any gaps.
prompt_templates.scenario: For users with multiple work streams who want comprehensive documentation

prompt_templates.title: Results-focused report with metrics
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me create a weekly report that emphasizes results and impact. For each item, highlight the background, specific actions taken, measurable outcomes, and business value delivered.
prompt_templates.scenario: For performance reviews or leadership-facing reports requiring quantified achievements

prompt_templates.title: Blocker and challenge documentation
prompt_templates.prompt: This week had significant challenges. Help me document what I accomplished, but also clearly explain the blockers I faced, their root causes, and who needs to be involved to resolve them.
prompt_templates.scenario: When the primary purpose is to escalate issues and clarify responsibility boundaries

output_examples.input: User describes: worked on customer API integration, fixed login bug, attended team planning
output: **1. API 集成项目 - 客户系统对接**
背景：客户需要将我们的系统与其内部 ERP 对接。完成了 API 接口设计和认证机制实现。目前已交付测试环境，等待客户反馈。下一步：跟进测试结果并修复问题。

output_examples.input: User wants to document a blocker situation
output: **核心卡点**：数据库性能问题导致页面加载缓慢
已尝试添加索引和优化查询，但效果有限。本质是数据架构设计问题，需要 DBA 协助进行表结构优化。已安排周三与 DBA 团队会议讨论方案。

best_practices: Complete all four elements for each item: background, actions, results, and next steps
Use specific numbers when available (cost savings, time reduced, revenue impact)
Document blockers honestly with clear problem analysis and ownership assignment
anti_patterns: Writing vague task lists without context or business value explanation
Over-polishing or exaggerating accomplishments beyond what actually happened
Omitting challenges and blockers to appear more productive

faq.question: How long does it take to generate a weekly report?
faq.answer: Typically 10-15 minutes for the guided conversation, depending on how many work items you need to document.

faq.question: Can I customize the report sections for my role?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill adapts to your role (developer, PM, designer, etc.) and you can create custom module names that fit your workflow.

faq.question: What if I don't have quantifiable metrics for my work?
faq.answer: Not all work can be quantified. The skill accepts qualitative descriptions and focuses on logical clarity rather than forcing numbers.

faq.question: Can I use this for bi-weekly or monthly reports?
faq.answer: Yes. The same structured approach works for any reporting period. Simply adjust the timeframe in your conversation.

faq.question: Does this skill support English output?
faq.answer: This skill is designed for Chinese language output. For English reports, consider using a different weekly report skill template.

faq.question: Where is the report saved?
faq.answer: The skill suggests saving to your local documents folder (e.g., /Documents/周报/) but you can choose any location you prefer.
